chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 53 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.1121/2022 (Return of Surety) 13-07-2022 Mr. Abdul Wahab G. Shaikh, Associate of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the applicant / surety. M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Bahawal-ud-Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutors NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application for return of surety. It appears that protective bail was granted to applicant / accused Yar Muhammad Junejo by this Court vide order dated 16-05-2022 in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court with direction to the applicant / accused to surrender before the trial Court within seven days. After grant of protective bail, surety was furnished by applicant / surety Muhammad Saeed in the shape of two original Special Savings Certificates amounting to Rs.50,000/- each, making total of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac). Thereafter, applicant / accused surrendered before the trial Court. As per endorsement of the Accountant of this Court, surety is no more required as the applicant / accused surrendered before the trial Court within the stipulated period. Copy of the certificate issued by the Registrar, Accountability Court, Sukkur regarding grant of interim pre-arrest bail to the applicant / accused on 19-05-2022 has been placed on record. Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In the view of above, application for return of the surety is allowed.

Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In the view of above, application for return of the surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the original Special Savings Certificates to the applicant / surety after proper identification and verification as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
